name: Moose Rump Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim off all excess fat and rub the roast all over with vegetable oil.
2. Sprinkle salt, pepper, and garlic powder evenly on the roast.
3. Place a layer of sliced onions at the bottom of the roasting pan.
4. Pour two tablespoons of Worcestershire sauce over the onion slices.
5. Place the roast on top of the onion slices.
6. Pour the remaining Worcestershire sauce over the roast.
7. Add red wine and water to the pan, ensuring it stays moist.
8. Cover the roasting pan with aluminum foil.
9. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 3 1/2 to 4 hours, adding water as needed.
10. Remove the roast from the pan when done.
11. To make gravy, add 2 cups of water to the contents of the pan and bring to a boil.
12. Scrape the bottom of the pan, then mix 3 tablespoons cornstarch with 1/2 cup water.
13. Pour this mixture into the pan, stirring constantly until the gravy is bubbling.
14. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
